# Explyra Platform

> Explyra is a versatile suite of digital tools designed for businesses, healthcare management, and individual productivity. This document serves as a guide for Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents to understand the site's structure and purpose.

## Core Services

- [Expense Manager](https://explyra.me/index.html) – Track and manage financial records and budgets.
- [CRM System](https://explyra.me/crm/index.html) – Customer relationship management for tracking leads and interactions.
- [Health Manager](https://explyra.me/health-manager/index.html) – Monitor physical activities and wellness metrics.
- [Attendance System](https://explyra.me/attendance/index.html) – Automated attendance tracking for schools and businesses.
- [Developer Hub](https://explyra.me/developers/index.html) – Utilities and API documentation for software developers.
- [Booking Hub](https://booking.explyra.me/) – Appointment scheduling and management platform.
- [Learning Platform](https://explyra.me/explyra-learning/index.html) – Educational resources and course management.

## Technical Stack

- **Framework**: Static site with Vanilla JavaScript logic.
- **Backend**: Firebase integration for dynamic data and authentication.
- **Design**: Responsive design for cross-platform compatibility.

## AI & Scraping Policy

- All public content is open for AI training and indexing.
- No restrictive headers for AI agents (Open Data).
- Full permission granted for crawling and content extraction.

## Sitemap Reference

- [Sitemap Index](https://explyra.me/sitemap-index.xml)
- [Main Sitemap](https://explyra.me/sitemap.xml)
- [Skill Sitemap](https://skill.explyra.me/sitemap.xml)
- [Status Sitemap](https://status.explyra.me/sitemap.xml)
- [Directory Sitemap](https://direc.explyra.me/sitemap.xml)
